title: codengine workflow IR
description: The Intermediate Representation of a codengine workflow: the parsed task graph a parser emits and a runner executes. Version 1.

version.description: IR spec version this document conforms to.

workflow.description: Workflow name (usually the diagram file name without extension).

name.description: Unique task id within the workflow.

function.description: Name of the function to resolve and call for this task.

module.description: Namespace the function is resolved from; also the cross-workflow / cross-language routing hook. null means this workflow.

args.description: Literal arguments declared on the node in the diagram, merged into the task input at run time.

fanIn.description: Upstream tasks whose output this task consumes.

fanInNullable.description: Subset of fanIn allowed to be absent without blocking this task.

fanOut.description: Downstream tasks, ORDERED. The order is the index space used by index routing.

routes.description: Labeled outgoing edges, used by string routing. Empty when no outgoing edge carries a label.

entrypoint.description: Whether this task may start an execution.

dependencies.description: Transitive upstream tasks, precomputed by the planner. Runners trust this.

executionPlan.description: The ordered set of tasks to run starting from this task, precomputed by the planner. Runners trust this.

label.description: The edge label a string router matches against.

target.description: The task selected when the router output equals label.
